scripts.dev: concurrently -n shell,catalog,cart,checkout,account,ds -c blue,green,yellow,red,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix shell" "npm run dev --prefix catalog-mfe" "npm run dev --prefix cart-mfe" "npm run dev --prefix checkout-mfe" "npm run dev --prefix account-mfe" "npm run dev --prefix design-system"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix catalog-mfe && npm run build --prefix cart-mfe && npm run build --prefix checkout-mfe && npm run build --prefix account-mfe && npm run build --prefix design-system && npm run build --prefix shell
